name: deepseek_v3_1
_comment_mla: Multi-head Latent Attention (DSv3 family). Same MLA dimensions as DeepSeek-R1 / V3.x family. n_kv is set to the canonical n_q value but is ignored when mla is present (KV cache uses the head-shared latent of width d_c + d_qk_rope = 576). See attention.md §3 for the variant-aware accounting.
_comment_moe: moe is null in this dense reference config — DSv3.1 production weights are MoE-shaped, but this entry models only the dense layer slice for shape-only experiments. Add a moe block to model the production MoE form.
